# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

apiVersion: kong.k8s.io/v1
kind: KongConfiguration
metadata:
  name: my-gateway
  namespace: default
spec:
  plugins:
    cors:
      enabled: true
      allow_any_method: false
      allow_credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
      origins:
        - "*" # Wildcard for all origins. Replace with specific ones if needed.
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Access-Control-Allow-Origin
        - Authorization
        - Content-Type
    authentication:
      realms:
        - myrealm:
            service_id: my-service
            listeners:
              - name: external
                path: /api/auth
            enable_token_storage: true
            authentication:
              cookie_header: Authorization
              token_key: access_token
    rate_limiting:
      global:
        limit_rpm: 1000
        burst_size: 50
      services:
        - name: my-service
          limits:
            - stage: ingress
              absolute: 100
              redis_key: rate_limiting.my-service.ingress
      routes:
        - service: my-service
          route: /my-route
          rate_limiting:
            absolute: 50
            redis_key: rate_limiting.my-service.my-route
